zh., Brereton, Cheshire, England: 英國英格蘭爾布雷雷頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Matilda Brereton於1298年出生在英國爾從萊頓時，她的父親William of Brereton34歲，母親Rohese de Vernon17歲。她與John Domville在英國英格蘭爾布雷雷頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1322年在英國享年24歲。

zh-hans., Brereton, Cheshire, England: 英国英格兰爾布雷雷頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Matilda Brereton于1298年出生在英国爾從萊頓时，她的父亲William of Brereton34岁，母亲Rohese de Vernon17岁。她与John Domville在英国英格兰爾布雷雷頓结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于1322年在英国享年24岁。

nameMeanings.name: Brereton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the places called Brereton, in Cheshire and Staffordshire, and sometimes from Brearton in Yorkshire or Brierton in Durham. Brereton in Staffordshire is named with Old English brǣr, brēr ‘briar’ + Old English dūn ‘hill’ as its final element; the others are named with Old English brǣr, brēr ‘briar’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.

variants.name: Brewerton
meanings: English: variant of   Brereton  , the result of confusion by folk etymology with the occupational name   Brewer  .

variants.name: Brierton
meanings: English: habitational name from Brierton in County Durham (formerly in Yorkshire) or Brearton in North Yorkshire, which are both named with Old English brēr ‘briar’ + tūn ‘farmstead’, or Brereton in Cheshire, which has the same origin (see Brereton ).

nameMeanings.name: Matilda
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

variants.name: Mathilda
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Matilda Brereton was born in 1298, in Congleton, Cheshire, England, her father, William of Brereton, was 34 and her mother, Rohese de Vernon, was 17. She married John Domville in Brereton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died in 1322, in England, at the age of 24.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Matilda Brereton est née en 1298, à Congleton, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, William of Brereton, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Rohese de Vernon, avait 17 ans. Elle a épousé John Domville à Brereton, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée en 1322, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 24 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Matilda Brereton 1298 in Congleton, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William of Brereton 34 und ihre Mutter Rohese de Vernon 17. Sie hat in Brereton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom John Domville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb 1322 im Alter von 24 Jahren in England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Matilda Brereton è nata il nel 1298 nel Congleton, Cheshire, England, sua padre, William of Brereton, aveva 34 anni e sua madre, Rohese de Vernon, aveva 17 anni. Lei sposato John Domville nel Brereton, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel 1322, nel England, all'età di 24 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Matilda Breretonが1298年にイギリスチェシュアイアコングレトンで生まれた時，父William of Breretonは34歳，母Rohese de Vernonは17歳であった。イギリスイギリスチェシュアイアブレレトンでJohn Domvilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1322年にイギリスで24歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Matilda Brereton(이)가 1298년 영국 체실르 콘글레턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William of Brereton(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Rohese de Vernon(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 브레레턴에서 John Domville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1322년 영국에서 24세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Matilda Brereton nasceu em 1298, em Congleton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William of Brereton, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Rohese de Vernon, tinha 17 anos. Ela casou-se com John Domville em Brereton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1322, em Inglaterra, com 24 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Matilda Brereton родилась в 1298 г. в местности конглетон, чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени William of Brereton было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Rohese de Vernon, 17. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Domville в местности бриретон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла в 1322 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 24 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Matilda Brereton nació en 1298, en Congleton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William of Brereton, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Rohese de Vernon, tenía 17 años. Se casó con John Domville en Brereton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió en 1322, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 24 años.
